text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
T.M. Opera O is talking to her<n>reflection in the
middle of dance<n>practice.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Oh, Opera O of the mirror... How did<n>you achieve
such beauty?

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Charms powerful enough to entice<n>even I, the
Centurial Overlord... Your<n>loveliness is terrifying!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
But I shall not give in! For I am<n>destined to stand
at the peak atop the<n>mountain path of
Overlordship!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Argh! You've yet to surrender, even<n>after our
arduous battle...

text_block_list.name: Dance Teacher
text_block_list.text:
T.M. Opera O! Do I have to tell you<n>again? I'm
locking up the studio now!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: B-But! I have yet to resolve this epic<n>conflict!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Opera O is forced to prematurely<n>withdraw from
her battle, the shock of<n>which leaves her in a rut.
